phrase.ph: 【小：こ】【麦：むぎ】【粉：こ】の【袋：ふくろ】

sentence.s: それらの【袋：ふくろ】を【運：はこ】ぶのを【手：て】【伝：つだ】った。
sentence.rom: Sorera no fukuro o hakobu no o tetsudatta.
sentence.tr_en: I helped carry those bags.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe geholfen, diese Säcke zu transportieren.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.94 vocab section

phrase.ph: 【奨：しょう】【学：がく】【金：きん】を【受：う】ける
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT; もらう would also work here

sentence.s: 【奨：しょう】【学：がく】【金：きん】のおかげで【留：りゅう】【学：がく】ができた。
sentence.rom: Shōgakukin no o-kage de ryūgaku ga dekita.
sentence.tr_en: Thanks to the scholarship, I was able to study abroad.
sentence.tr_de: Dank dem Stipendium konnte ich im Ausland studieren.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.288

phrase.ph: 【自：し】【然：ぜん】の【原：げん】【因：いん】
phrase.rem: ChatGPT says 自然な is 'natural' in a broader sense, while 自然の is more directly linked to nature or natural forces

sentence.s: 【週：しゅう】【末：まつ】は【自：し】【然：ぜん】の【中：なか】でのんびり【過：す】ごしたい。
sentence.rom: Shūmatsu wa shizen no naka de nonbiri sugoshitai.
sentence.tr_en: I want to relax in nature over the weekend.
sentence.tr_de: Am Wochenende will ich mich in der Natur entspannen.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.77

sentence.s: あれは【本：ほん】【当：とう】に【感：かん】【動：どう】【的：てき】だった。
sentence.rom: Are wa hontō ni kandō-teki datta.
sentence.tr_en: That was truly touching.
sentence.tr_de: Das war wirklich rührend.

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】が【一：いち】【番：ばん】【感：かん】【動：どう】した【映：えい】【画：が】は「【生：い】きる」です。
sentence.rom: Watashi ga ichi-ban kandō shita eiga wa ‘Ikiru’ desu.
sentence.tr_en: The movie I was touched by the most is 'To Live'.
sentence.tr_de: Der Film, von dem ich am meisten berührt war, ist 'Leben'.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.116 vocab section; jisho has nx

sentence.s: 【宝：たから】くじに【当：あ】たったら、そのお【金：かね】で【何：なに】を【買：か】いますか。
sentence.rom: Takarakuji ni atattara, sono o-kane de nani o kaimasu ka?
sentence.tr_en: If you were to win the lottery, what would you buy with the money?
sentence.tr_de: Wenn Sie in der Lotterie gewinnen würden, was würden Sie mit dem Geld kaufen?

phrase.tr_en: to be a nuisance; to be in the way

sentence.s: お【邪：じゃ】【魔：ま】します。
sentence.rom: O-jama shimasu.
sentence.tr_en: Sorry to bother you.
sentence.tr_de: Entschuldigen Sie die Störung.
sentence.explanation_de: beim Betreten der Wohnung von jemand anderem

sentence.s: その【椅：い】【子：す】は【邪：じゃ】【魔：ま】なので、【移：い】【動：どう】してもいい？
sentence.rom: Sono isu wa jama na no de, idō shite mo ii?
sentence.tr_en: That chair is in the way, may I move it?
sentence.tr_de: Dieser Stuhl ist im Weg, kann ich ihn verschieben?

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.116 vocab section

phrase.ph: 【授：じゅ】【業：ぎょう】の【準：じゅん】【備：び】をする
【会：かい】【議：ぎ】の【準：じゅん】【備：び】をする
ご【飯：はん】の【準：じゅん】【備：び】をする
phrase.rem: ご飯の用意をする would also be correct

sentence.s: 【心：こころ】の【準：じゅん】【備：び】ができていない。
sentence.rom: Kokoro no junbi ga dekite inai.
sentence.tr_en: I'm not mentally prepared.
sentence.tr_de: Ich bin nicht mental darauf vorbereitet.

sentence.s: もう【会：かい】【議：ぎ】の【準：じゅん】【備：び】が【終：お】わりましたか。
sentence.rom: Mō kaigi no junbi ga owarimashita ka?
sentence.tr_en: Have you finished preparing for the meeting already?
sentence.tr_de: Haben Sie die Vorbereitungen für die Sitzung bereits abgeschlossen?

sentence.s: ナオミと【恋：こい】におちた。
sentence.rom: Naomi to koi ni ochita.
sentence.tr_en: I fell in love with Naomi.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe mich in Naomi verliebt.

sentence.s: カオルとハルトはきっと【恋：こい】に【落：お】ちる。
sentence.rom: Kaoru to Haruto wa kitto koi ni ochiru.
sentence.tr_en: Kaoru and Haruto will surely fall in love.
sentence.tr_de: Kaoru und Haruto werden sich bestimmt noch verlieben.

word.rem: is now a phrase of koi-love

phrase.ph: 【申：もう】し【訳：わけ】ありません
phrase.tr_en: There is no excuse for it. (I'm sorry.)
phrase.tr_de: Es gibt keine Entschuldigung dafür. (Tut mir leid.)

sentence.s: 【申：もう】し【訳：わけ】ないですが【明日：あした】【来：こ】られません。
sentence.rom: Mōshiwake nai desu ga ashita koraremasen.
sentence.tr_en: I don't have any excuse, but I can't come tomorrow.
sentence.tr_de: Es gibt keine Entschuldigung, aber ich kann morgen nicht kommen.

sentence.s: これは【私：わたし】のミスで、【申：もう】し【訳：わけ】ございません。
sentence.rom: Kore wa watashi no misu de, mōshiwake gozaimasen.
sentence.tr_en: This was my mistake. I sincerely apologise.
sentence.tr_de: Das war mein Fehler. Bitte um Entschuldigung.

word.tr_en: I'm sorry; (it's) inexcusable; I feel regretful
word.rem: part of mōshiwake-apology

phrase.ph: 【外：がい】【国：こく】【語：ご】の【学：がく】【習：しゅう】

sentence.s: 【日：に】【本：ほん】【語：ご】をもっと【早：はや】く【学：がく】【習：しゅう】するにはどうしたらいいですか。
sentence.rom: Nihon-go o motto hayaku gakushū suru ni wa dō shitara ii desu ka?
sentence.tr_en: What should I do to learn Japanese faster?
sentence.tr_de: Was muss ich tun, um schneller Japanisch zu lernen?

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.116 vocab section; jisho has n2

phrase.tr_en: a room in a hostel or dormitory
phrase.tr_de: Raum in einer Herberge oder einem Wohnheim

sentence.s: その【寮：りょう】の【部：へ】【屋：や】はかなり【狭：せま】い。
sentence.rom: Sono ryō no heya wa kanari semai.
sentence.tr_en: The dorm room is quite small.
sentence.tr_de: Das Zimmer in der Herberge ist ziemlich klein.

sentence.s: この【騒：さわ】ぎはどうしたの？
sentence.rom: Kono sawagi wa dō shita no?
sentence.tr_en: What's all this commotion?
sentence.tr_de: Was soll die ganze Aufregung?

phrase.ph: 【出：しゅっ】【発：ぱつ】【時：じ】【間：かん】
【出：しゅっ】【発：ぱつ】の【合：あい】【図：ず】

sentence.s: 【明日：あした】【出：しゅっ】【発：ぱつ】する【予：よ】【定：てい】です。
sentence.rom: Ashita shuppatsu suru yotei desu.
sentence.tr_en: We intend to depart tomorrow.
sentence.tr_de: Wir wollen morgen abreisen.

sentence.s: 【出：しゅっ】【発：ぱつ】しますから、【早：はや】く【乗：の】ってください。
sentence.rom: Shuppatsu shimasu kara, hayaku notte kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: We're leaving, so please get in quickly.
sentence.tr_de: Wir fahren gleich ab, also bitte steige schnell ein.

phrase.ph: 【到：とう】【着：ちゃく】【時：じ】【刻：こく】
【空：くう】【港：こう】に【到：とう】【着：ちゃく】する

sentence.s: 【到：とう】【着：ちゃく】は【何：なん】【時：じ】ですか。
sentence.rom: Tōchaku wa nan-ji desu ka?
sentence.tr_en: At what time will we arrive?
sentence.tr_de: Um welche Zeit werden wir ankommen?

sentence.s: カーテンを【開：あ】けて【日：にっ】【光：こう】を【入：い】れなさい。
sentence.rom: Kāten o akete nikkō o ire-nasai.
sentence.tr_en: Open the curtains and let the sunshine in.
sentence.tr_de: Mache die Vorhänge auf und lass das Sonnenlicht herein.

sentence.s: 【写：しゃ】【真：しん】を【日：にっ】【光：こう】に【当：あ】ててはいけない。
sentence.rom: Shashin o nikkō ni atete wa ikenai.
sentence.tr_en: Do not expose photos to sunlight.
sentence.tr_de: Setzen Sie die Fotos nicht dem Sonnenlicht aus.

sentence.s: 【四：し】【月：がつ】から【新：しん】【学：がっ】【期：き】が【始：はじ】まる。
sentence.rom: Shi-gatsu kara shingakki ga hajimaru.
sentence.tr_en: The new school term starts in April.
sentence.tr_de: Das neue Schuljahr beginnt im April.

sentence.s: 【今：こん】【学：がっ】【期：き】の【成：せい】【績：せき】が【悪：わる】かったので、もっと【勉：べん】【強：きょう】しなければなりません。
sentence.rom: Kongakki no seiseki ga warukatta no de, motto benkyō shinakereba narimasen.
sentence.tr_en: I had poor grades this semster, so I need to study more.
sentence.tr_de: Ich hatte schlechte Noten dieses Semster, deshalb muss ich mehr studieren.

word.rem: also: bug (computer)

phrase.ph: 【文：ぶん】【法：ぽう】【的：てき】な【誤：あやま】り

sentence.s: コードに【誤：あやま】りがあります。
sentence.rom: Kōdo ni ayamari ga arimasu.
sentence.tr_en: There's an error in the code.
sentence.tr_de: Es hat einen Fehler im Code.
sentence.rem: a programming bug is often バグ rather than 誤り

phrase.tr_en: to be sitting on the floor

sentence.s: 【鏡：かがみ】が【床：ゆか】に【落：お】ちてしまいました。
sentence.rom: Kagami ga yuka ni ochite shimaimashita.
sentence.tr_en: The mirror fell on the floor (sadly).
sentence.tr_de: Der Spiegel ist leider auf den Boden gefallen.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 L21 vocab section; jisho has n2

phrase.ph: 【昼：ひる】【休：やす】みに【昼：ひる】【寝：ね】をする
phrase.tr_en: to take a nap during lunch break
phrase.tr_de: in der Mittagspause einen Mittagsschlaf machen

sentence.s: 【毎：まい】【日：にち】 【何：なん】【時：じ】【間：かん】【昼：ひる】【寝：ね】しますか。
sentence.rom: Mai-nichi nan-jikan hirune shimasu ka?
sentence.tr_en: How many hours do you take a siesta every day?
sentence.tr_de: Wieviele Stunden nimmst du eine Siesta jeden Tag?

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.116 vocab section

phrase.rem: jisho has n1 for akasu, but n3 for akari; to blab out a secret is 秘密をバラす, which is nx

sentence.s: リサちゃんは【秘：ひ】【密：みつ】を【守：まも】れなくなって、【言：い】っちゃった。
sentence.rom: Risa-chan wa himitsu o mamorenaku natte, icchatta.
sentence.tr_en: Risa could no longer keep the secret and said it, unfortunately.
sentence.tr_de: Risa konnte das Geheimnis nicht länger halten und sagte es leider.
sentence.rem: rephrased by ChatGPT; ChatGPT couldn't quite settle on a version it likes

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.94 vocab section

phrase.ph: 【結：けっ】【婚：こん】して【親：しん】【戚：せき】になる
【遠：とお】い【親：しん】【戚：せき】【関：かん】【係：けい】

sentence.s: ヨシとミキは【親：しん】【戚：せき】です。
sentence.rom: Yoshi to Miki wa shinseki desu.
sentence.tr_en: Yoshi and Miki are relatives.
sentence.tr_de: Yoshi und Miki sind Verwandte.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.81

phrase.ph: 【親：しん】【切：せつ】な【態：たい】【度：ど】
【前：まえ】【向：む】きな【態：たい】【度：ど】
phrase.rem: jisho has nx for mae-muki, but n5 for mae, n3 for muki

sentence.s: 【小：お】【川：がわ】さんはどんな【状：じょう】【況：きょう】でも【態：たい】【度：ど】が【冷：れい】【静：せい】だ。
sentence.rom: Ogawa-san wa donna jōkyō demo taido ga reisei da.
sentence.tr_en: Mr Ogawa remains calm in any situation.
sentence.tr_de: Herr Ogawa bleibt ruhig in jeder Situation.

sentence.s: 【信：しん】【号：ごう】は【全：ぜん】【部：ぶ】【赤：あか】だった。
sentence.rom: Shingō wa zenbu aka datta.
sentence.tr_en: The traffic lights were all red.
sentence.tr_de: Die Verkehrsampeln waren alle rot.

sentence.s: この【俳：はい】【優：ゆう】はかっこよすぎる。
sentence.rom: Kono haiyū wa kakkoyo-sugiru.
sentence.tr_en: This actor is too cool.
sentence.tr_de: Dieser Schauspieler ist zu cool.

phrase.ph: 【信：しん】【頼：らい】できる【人：じん】【物：ぶつ】
【登：とう】【場：じょう】【人：じん】【物：ぶつ】
phrase.tr_en: the characters of a book, drama, etc.
phrase.tr_de: die Charaktere in einem Buch, Drama, usw.
phrase.rem: verified with lib0; jisho has n2 for tōjō

sentence.s: 【山：やま】【口：ぐち】【先：せん】【生：せい】はみんなが【尊：そん】【敬：けい】している【人：じん】【物：ぶつ】です。
sentence.rom: Yamaguchi-sensei wa minna ga sonkei shite iru jinbutsu desu.
sentence.tr_en: Professor Yamaguchi is a person everybody respects.
sentence.tr_de: Professor Yamaguchi ist eine von allen respektierte Person.
sentence.explanation_en: 人物 sounds more formal than just 人
sentence.explanation_de: 人物 tönt formeller als bloss 人

phrase.ph: 【日：にち】【常：じょう】【生：せい】【活：かつ】

sentence.s: 【日：にち】【常：じょう】【生：せい】【活：かつ】での【小：ちい】さな【幸：しあわ】せを【大：たい】【切：せつ】にします。
sentence.rom: Nichijō seikatsu de no chīsana shiawase o taisetsu ni shimasu.
sentence.tr_en: I value the small joys in my everyday life.
sentence.tr_de: Ich schätze die kleinen Glücksmomente im Alltag.
sentence.rem: taisetsu ni suru verified with lib0

word.tr_en: shade; in the dark; behind sth.

phrase.ph: 【大：おお】きな【木：き】の【陰：かげ】で
phrase.rom: ōki na ki no kage de
phrase.tr_en: in the shade of a big tree
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT; there is also 木陰・こかげ（nx）, but it cannot be combined with ōkina

sentence.s: マリは【陰：かげ】で【泣：な】いていた。
sentence.rom: Mari wa kage de naite ita.
sentence.tr_en: Mari cried secretly (behind the scenes).
sentence.tr_de: Mari weinte im Stillen (im Dunkeln).

sentence.s: 【毎：まい】【日：にち】【市：いち】【場：ば】に【買：か】い【物：もの】に【行：い】っています。
sentence.rom: Mai-nichi ichiba ni kaimono ni itte imasu.
sentence.tr_en: I go shopping at the market every day.
sentence.tr_de: Ich gehe jeden Tag auf dem Markt einkaufen.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT; pronounciation しじょう would be incorrect here

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【金：きん】【庫：こ】から【私：わたし】の【金：かね】を【盗：ぬす】んだ。
sentence.rom: Kare wa kinko kara watashi no kane o nusunda.
sentence.tr_en: He stole my money from the safe.
sentence.tr_de: Er hat mein Geld aus dem Safe gestolen.

sentence.s: 【湖：みずうみ】には【薄：うす】い【氷：こおり】が【貼：は】っていた。
sentence.rom: Mizūmi ni wa usui kōri ga hatte ita.
sentence.tr_en: A thin (layer of) ice had formed on the lake.
sentence.tr_de: Eine dünne (Schicht) Eis hatte sich auf dem See gebildet.

phrase.ph: 【会：かい】【議：ぎ】に【出：しゅっ】【席：せき】する
phrase.tr_en: to be present at the meeting

sentence.s: 【全：ぜん】【員：いん】が【出：しゅっ】【席：せき】していた。
sentence.rom: Zen'in ga shusseki shite ita.
sentence.tr_en: Everybody was present.
sentence.tr_de: Alle waren anwesend.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.117 vocab section as o-inori; jisho has nx for o-inori, n1 for inori

sentence.s: ご【成：せい】【功：こう】をお【祈：いの】りします。
sentence.rom: Go-seikō o o-inori shimasu.
sentence.tr_en: I pray for your success.
sentence.tr_de: Ich bete für deinen Erfolg.
sentence.rem: 'your' is probably correct, because the sentence is in honorific form

sentence.s: 【彼：かの】【女：じょ】の【祈：いの】りから【何：なに】も【起：お】こらなかった。
sentence.rom: Kanojo no inori kara nani mo okoranakatta.
sentence.tr_en: Nothing has resulted from her prayer.
sentence.tr_de: Ihre Gebete blieben ohne Ergebnis.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.116 vocab section

phrase.ph: 【給：きゅう】【料：りょう】をもらう

sentence.s: 【四：し】【月：がつ】から【給：きゅう】【料：りょう】が【少：すこ】し【上：あ】がります。
sentence.rom: Shi-gatsu kara kyūryō ga sukoshi agarimasu.
sentence.tr_en: My salary will increase slightly from April.
sentence.tr_de: Mein Gehalt wird ab April ein bisschen höher sein.

word.rem: hidden, because compounds are much more common

phrase.ph: 【物：もの】【語：がたり】の【始：はじ】まり

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】は【物：もの】【語：がたり】をたくさん【書：か】いた。
sentence.rom: Watashi wa monogatari o takusan kaita.
sentence.tr_en: I've written a lot of stories.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe viele Geschichten geschrieben.

word.rem: jisho has n1

sentence.s: この【窓：まど】は【南：みなみ】【向：む】きだ。
sentence.rom: Kono mado wa minami-muki da.
sentence.tr_en: This window looks to the south.
sentence.tr_de: Dieses Fenster schaut nach Süden.

sentence.s: 【嵐：あらし】になるだろう。
sentence.rom: Arashi ni naru darō.
sentence.tr_en: There will be a storm, I guess.
sentence.tr_de: Es gibt bald einen Sturm, denke ich.

sentence.s: 【飛：ひ】【行：こう】【中：ちゅう】はシートベルトをお【締：し】めになったままでお【過：す】ごしください。
sentence.rom: Hikō-chū wa shītoberuto o o-shime ni natta mama de o-sugoshi kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: Please keep your seatbelt fastened while the aircraft is in flight.
sentence.tr_de: Bitte lassen Sie Ihren Sitzgurt während der Zeit des Fluges angeschnallt.
sentence.rem: jisho has nx for shītoberuto, but it appears in 500mon q298

phrase.rem: there is also 花香・かこう (nx), but it's literary or poetic and uncommon in casual speech

sentence.s: 【甘：あま】い【香：かお】りがする。
sentence.rom: Amai kaori ga suru.
sentence.tr_en: There is a sweet scent.
sentence.tr_de: Es duftet süss.

word.hint_en: after graduating from university for master's and doctor's degrees
word.hint_de: nach Abschluss der Universität für Master- und Doktortitel
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.94 vocab section; jisho has n2

phrase.ph: 【大：だい】【学：がく】【院：いん】【生：せい】

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【大：だい】【学：がく】【院：いん】で【勉：べん】【強：きょう】を【続：つづ】けた。
sentence.rom: Kare wa daigakuin de benkyō o tsudzuketa.
sentence.tr_en: He continued his studies at graduate school.
sentence.tr_de: Er führte seine Studien an der Graduiertenschule fort.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.117 vocab section; jisho has nx

phrase.ph: 【最：さい】【悪：あく】の【事：じ】【態：たい】に【備：そな】える
phrase.tr_de: sich auf das Schlimmste (die schlimmste Situation) vorbereiten
phrase.rem: lib0 also has saiaku no bāi

sentence.s: これは【私：わたし】が【今：いま】までに【見：み】た【中：なか】で【最：さい】【悪：あく】の【映：えい】【画：が】です。
sentence.rom: Kore wa watashi ga ima made ni mita naka de saiaku no eiga desu.
sentence.tr_en: Among all the films I have seen so far, this is the worst.
sentence.tr_de: Unter allen Filmen, die ich je gesehen habe, ist dies der schlechteste.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT that 中 is prounounced なか here, and that の中で would be wrong here; but this would be possible: 私が今までに見た映画の中では、これは最悪です

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.95 vocab section as jitsu wa; jisho has n1

phrase.ph: 【名：な】を【捨：す】てて【実：じつ】を【取：と】る
phrase.rom: na o sutete jitsu o toru
phrase.rem: verified with ChatGPT that it's indeed じつ, not み

sentence.s: 【彼：かの】【女：じょ】は【彼：かれ】の【実：じつ】の【母：はは】です。
sentence.rom: Kanojo wa kare no jitsu no haha desu.
sentence.tr_en: She is his real mother.
sentence.tr_de: Sie ist seine echte Mutter.

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.117 vocab section

phrase.rem: jisho has nx, but n3 for ritsu

sentence.s: 【中：なか】【村：むら】さんは【夫：おっと】と【離：り】【婚：こん】したね。
sentence.rom: Nakamura-san wa otto to rikon shita ne.
sentence.tr_en: Mrs Nakamura divorced her husband, right?
sentence.tr_de: Frau Kanamura ist von ihrem Ehemann geschieden, richtig?

word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.287 kanji section

phrase.ph: 【自：じ】【転：てん】【車：しゃ】で【通：つう】【学：がく】する
phrase.tr_en: to commute to school by bike
phrase.tr_de: mit dem Fahrrad an die Schule pendeln

sentence.s: たいてい【歩：ある】いて【通：つう】【学：がく】します。
sentence.rom: Taitei aruite tsūgaku shimasu.
sentence.tr_en: I generally walk to school.
sentence.tr_de: Gewöhnlich gehe ich zu Fuss zur Schule.

phrase.ph: 【冗：じょう】【談：だん】に【笑：わら】う

sentence.s: 【小：こ】【林：ばやし】さんの【冗：じょう】【談：だん】で【場：ば】の【空：くう】【気：き】が【壊：こわ】れた。
sentence.rom: Kobayashi-san no jōdan de ba no kūki ga kowareta.
sentence.tr_en: Because of Mr Kobayashi’s joke, the atmosphere was broken.
sentence.tr_de: Wegen Herr Kobayashis Scherz war die ganze Stimmung dahin.

sentence.s: 【物：ぶつ】【理：り】は【私：わたし】の【好：す】きな【科：か】【目：もく】だ。
sentence.rom: Butsuri wa watashi no suki na kamoku da.
sentence.tr_en: Physics is my favourite subject.
sentence.tr_de: Physik ist mein Lieblingsfach.

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】は【物：ぶつ】【理：り】に【少：すこ】しも【興：きょう】【味：み】がない。
sentence.rom: Watashi wa butsuri ni sukoshi mo kyōmi ga nai.
sentence.tr_en: I'm not in the least interested in physics.
sentence.tr_de: Ich bin kein bisschen an Physik interessiert.

phrase.ph: 【本：ほん】【人：にん】【確：かく】【認：にん】

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】【本：ほん】【人：にん】がやってきた。
sentence.rom: Kare honnin ga yatte kita.
sentence.tr_en: He came in person.
sentence.tr_de: Er selbst kam persönlich.

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】はその【女：じょ】【優：ゆう】【本：ほん】【人：にん】に【話：はな】しかけた。
sentence.rom: Watashi wa sono joyū honnin ni hanashi-kaketa.
sentence.tr_en: I spoke to that actress herself.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe mit dieser Schauspielerin persönlich geredet.

sentence.s: 【君：きみ】【本：ほん】【人：にん】が【行：い】かなければならないだろう。
sentence.rom: Kimi honnin ga ikanakereba naranai darō.
sentence.tr_en: I suppose you'll have to go in person.
sentence.tr_de: Du wirst wohl persönlich hingehen müssen, würde ich sagen.

phrase.rem: jisho has nx; ChatGPT and macOS TextToSpeech say しょくようゆ, but jisho has しょくようあぶら

sentence.s: 【服：ふく】は【油：あぶら】で【汚：よご】れていた。
sentence.rom: Fuku wa abura de yogorete ita.
sentence.tr_en: My clothes were dirty with oil.
sentence.tr_de: Meine Kleider waren mit Öl verschmutzt.

word.rem: now a phrase of abura

sentence.s: 【粉：こな】と【卵：たまご】【２：に】【個：こ】を【混：ま】ぜなさい。
sentence.rom: Kona to tamago ni-ko o mazenasai.
sentence.tr_en: Mix the flour and the two eggs together.
sentence.tr_de: Mische das Mehl und die zwei Eier zusammen.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT; also possible: 卵を２個、粉と混ぜなさい

sentence.s: 【瓶：びん】は【粉：こな】【々：ごな】に【割：わ】れた。
sentence.rom: Bin wa kona-gona ni wareta.
sentence.tr_en: The bottle broke to pieces.
sentence.tr_de: Die Flasche zerbrach in Stücke.

word.rem: jisho has n1; is now a phrase of kona

phrase.ph: 【川：かわ】を【泳：およ】いで【渡：わた】る【勇：ゆう】【気：き】
phrase.tr_en: the courage to swim across the river
phrase.tr_de: der Mut, den Fluss schwimmend zu überqueren

phrase.ph: 【電：でん】【話：わ】する【勇：ゆう】【気：き】
phrase.tr_en: the courage to make a phone call

sentence.s: 【君：きみ】は【勇：ゆう】【気：き】があるね。
sentence.rom: Kimi wa yūki ga aru ne.
sentence.tr_en: You're very brave, aren't you?
sentence.tr_de: Du bist aber mutig!

phrase.ph: 【普：ふ】【通：つう】の【人：にん】【間：げん】

sentence.s: 【犬：いぬ】は【人：にん】【間：げん】にとって【最：さい】【高：こう】の【友：とも】です。
sentence.rom: Inu wa ningen ni totte saikō no tomo desu.
sentence.tr_en: A dog is a human's best friend.
sentence.tr_de: Der Hund ist des Menschen bester Freund.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT; jisho has nx for ni totte
